title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 306.555 - Inspection of outboard motors
text:
306.555.  Inspection of outboard motors. — For the purposes of reasonable and proper administration and enforcement of the provisions of sections 306.530 to 306.575 all outboard motors within this state shall be subject to inspection by peace officers.
(L. 1945 p. 1191 § 7)
